evidence.claim: Experience with Information Retrieval Systems, Content Matching, Text Encoders, TensorFlow, Search & Discovery, CNN, Model Adaptation, Machine Learning, Ranking Systems, Diffusion Models, OpenSearch, Computer Vision, Milvus, and Recommendation Systems.
evidence.source_text: Skills: Information Retrieval Systems (advanced, 24mo, 39 endorsements); Content Matching (expert, 82mo, 46 endorsements); Text Encoders (expert, 77mo, 53 endorsements); TensorFlow (advanced, 38mo, 21 endorsements); Search & Discovery (expert, 45mo, 57 endorsements); CNN (intermediate, 9mo, 3 endorsements); Model Adaptation (expert, 43mo, 45 endorsements); Machine Learning (expert, 67mo, 38 endorsements); Ranking Systems (expert, 72mo, 42 endorsements); Diffusion Models (intermediate, 23mo, 4 endorsements); OpenSearch (expert, 95mo, 43 endorsements); Computer Vision (advanced, 48mo, 32 endorsements); Milvus (expert, 85mo, 15 endorsements); Recommendation Systems (expert, 79mo, 9 endorsements)

evidence.claim: Built infrastructure processing billions of documents and serving millions of queries with low latency.
evidence.source_text: The system processed billions of documents and served millions of queries with low latency.

evidence.claim: Led a team of 4 engineers at Swiggy.
evidence.source_text: I had a small team of 4 across this work.

evidence.claim: Designed offline experimentation environments, online A/B testing frameworks, and feature-engineering pipelines.
evidence.source_text: Designed the offline experimentation environment, the online A/B testing framework, and the feature-engineering pipeline that connected them.

evidence.claim: Prefers shipping real systems over research-only work; prioritizes v1 in 6 weeks over perfect v2 in 6 months.
evidence.source_text: Strong preference for shipping real systems over research-only work; I'd rather have a working v1 in 6 weeks than a perfect v2 in 6 months.

evidence.claim: Learned from past mistakes including over-engineering and optimizing metrics that didn't impact online performance.
evidence.source_text: I've made the standard mistakes — over-engineering early, optimizing offline metrics that didn't move online numbers, building beautiful infrastructure for features that users didn't actually want — so I notice them faster now.

evidence.claim: Earned Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer certification and Deep Learning Specialization.
evidence.source_text: Certifications: Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer (Google Cloud, 2019); Deep Learning Specialization (Coursera/DeepLearning.AI, 2018)

evidence.claim: Collaborated closely with product and growth teams.
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with the product and growth teams.
